authority: active refactor preservation evidence; this registry cannot authorize new behavior
freeze_boundary: A registry row records what exists and what must survive refactor. Promotion, remounting, new writes, new output surfaces, schema changes, and parked work still require an approved plan.
rules: Shipped and partial rows with preservation_required=true must retain their documented user effect or receive an explicitly approved status change with replacement proof.
Partial rows enumerate computation, delivery, UI, and mutation separately; one shipped facet does not promote the whole feature.
Archive, parked, historical, and concept documents may identify evidence only and may not appear as active contracts.
Browser proof names a real route and harness check or records the path as gated; a gated path is not proof.
Provider facts remain provenance-bearing candidates and never become execution truth without canonical user confirmation.
Decision, delivery, authenticated browser render, interaction, mutation, and later outcome remain distinct.
The registry is a preservation guard, not a backlog or implementation authority.

features.name: Terms and research consent gate
features.owner: Users consent endpoint and ConsentModal
features.user_effect: Blocks the authenticated app until terms are accepted and records optional research consent separately.

gated: fresh-account consent acceptance lacks an automated disposable-account browser path

features.rollback: Revert the presentation seam without rewriting consent timestamps.
known_gaps: Fresh-account browser acceptance is not automated.

features.name: Brain Dump onboarding capture
features.owner: Brain Dump parser candidates plus TaskManager and DeadlineManager commit authority
features.user_effect: Parses free text without writes, lets the user review/edit/include/discard, then intentionally commits valid items with per-item outcomes.

browser.check: brain dump partial commit saves valid item only
brain dump double-submit creates exactly one task

gated: the mounted first-run onboarding commit path is not separately browser-proven; current proof uses the reusable Pulse flow

features.rollback: Revert the onboarding UI seam while retaining accepted canonical rows and parser idempotency.
known_gaps: Actual mounted order is consent, Brain Dump onboarding, then survey.
Skip is optimistic/fire-and-forget.
Pulse and onboarding error-state parity is incomplete.

SurveyPrior remains provisional and is not identity truth.
